prompt: A premium brand identity logo displayed on a solid matte black background. The logo shows the letters 'MM' constructed from thick geometric neon cyan (#00E3FF) glowing lines, forming a sharp angular monogram. The two M letters share their middle vertical stroke, creating one unified symbol. The lines have a subtle neon glow effect, like electric signage at night. Below the monogram, 'AGENCY' is written in thin spaced-out white uppercase letters. The overall look is dark, premium, futuristic — like a high-end nightclub or luxury tech brand logo. Clean vector quality, no texture, no grain, sharp edges. Professional logo presentation centered on black canvas.
negative_prompt: realistic photo, photography, human, face, body, nature, landscape, gradient background, colorful background, busy background, multiple colors, hand-drawn, sketch, watercolor, vintage, retro, grunge, noise, grain, blur, low quality, pixelated, text errors, misspelling
